dict.string: LLMessenger creates calendar events when you approve a scheduling action from a conversation.
LLMessenger adds events to your calendar when you approve a scheduling action from a conversation.
LLMessenger uses your contacts to display names instead of phone numbers in message briefs.
LLMessenger uses the microphone only while you dictate a command to the agent.
LLMessenger transcribes your spoken commands on-device so you can tell the agent what to do.
